title: Text Formatting Tooltip
description: Text formatting cheat sheet inside anvil GUI
body:
## What does this resourcepack do?

It creates a simple cheat sheet in anvil GUI to help with text formatting

![Main preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZdCzpKUH/images/e1428ea6fe9c4445968b7e75b61fddd379cf7b63.png)

# ⚠⚠⚠WARNING

This resourcepack can not make visible changes in real game text. This resourcepack only adds a small tooltip for editing text in [minecraft text formatting](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Formatting_codes)

But you can always download [text formatting everywhere](https://modrinth.com/mod/text-formatting-everywhere) mod

# Supported languages

This resourcepack uses symbols in the name of an anvil for a tooltip, so it might be buggy with languages like arabic or hebrew (all languages that white right-to-left)
